objectives: Set up a basic web page structure using Html
Style page layout and typography using CSS
Add interactivity using JavaScript
Explain how web programming connects structure, style, and behavior
learning_path.title: Web Programming Foundations with Html, CSS, and JavaScript

objectives: Describe core Http concepts used in web programming
Make requests to Rest Apis using JavaScript
Handle responses and errors in JavaScript
Render fetched data into an Html page
learning_path.title: Http Basics and Calling Rest Apis with JavaScript

objectives: Explain key JavaScript Framework concepts using React
Build reusable UI pieces in React
Manage UI updates driven by JavaScript data
Compose a small page using React with basic styling
learning_path.title: JavaScript Framework Concepts with React

objectives: Add TypeScript to an existing React setup
Use TypeScript to improve correctness in JavaScript code
Type common React patterns using TypeScript
Refactor a small React feature from JavaScript to TypeScript
learning_path.title: Add TypeScript to a React Project

objectives: Create a simple server using Node.Js
Implement basic Rest Apis endpoints
Use Http concepts to reason about requests and responses
Connect a JavaScript client to Node.Js Rest Apis
learning_path.title: Node.Js Fundamentals for Rest Apis

objectives: Model simple data using Sql tables
Write basic Sql queries for common operations
Integrate Sql-backed data into Node.Js Rest Apis
Validate API behavior by querying and returning Sql results
learning_path.title: Sql Basics and Data Access for Node.Js

objectives: Explain authentication and authorization flows using Authentication And Authorization (Oauth2/Jwt)
Protect Rest Apis endpoints using Authentication And Authorization (Oauth2/Jwt)
Use Http headers appropriately for Authentication And Authorization (Oauth2/Jwt)
Integrate a JavaScript client with authenticated Rest Apis
learning_path.title: Authentication And Authorization (Oauth2/Jwt) for Rest Apis

objectives: Develop digital content that explains a small end-to-end web programming project
Create a concise walkthrough of React UI and Node.Js Rest Apis behavior
Document Http interactions and Authentication And Authorization (Oauth2/Jwt) usage
Summarize Sql data flow from storage to UI
learning_path.title: Develop Digital Content: Building and Presenting a Full Web Programming Demo

matched_occupation.description: Web developers develop, implement and document web-accessible software based on the designs provided. They align the client's web presence with its business strategy, troubleshoot software problems and issues and look for ways to improve the application.
matched_occupation.label: web developer
